resorts.name: Kumarakom Lake Resort
resorts.description: Experience the magic of God's Own Country at this award-winning luxury retreat on the banks of Lake Vembanad. Stay in traditional Keralan villas, drift along the scenic backwaters in a classic houseboat, and soak in mesmerizing sunsets from the temperature-controlled infinity pool.

resorts.name: The Serai
resorts.description: Surrounded by acres of fragrant coffee estates, this sophisticated resort is a haven for nature lovers and luxury seekers alike. Guests can enjoy exclusive private pool villas, embark on guided coffee plantation tours, and explore the winding trails of Chikmagalur on a bicycle.

resorts.name: The Panoramic Getaway
resorts.description: True to its name, this elevated retreat offers breathtaking, unobstructed valley views from every corner of the property. Featuring a stunning rooftop pool, world-class modern amenities, and a private helipad, it redefines high-altitude luxury in the misty hills of Munnar.

resorts.name: Taj Fort Aguada Resort & Spa
resorts.description: Built on the ramparts of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress, this vibrant beachfront property offers the ultimate Goan holiday. Enjoy panoramic views of the Arabian Sea, thrilling water sports right on the beach, and energetic party areas that capture the true spirit of Goa.

resorts.name: Rambagh Palace
resorts.description: Live like royalty at this former residence of the Maharaja of Jaipur. This architectural masterpiece features opulent royal heritage suites, the historic Polo Bar, and the spectacular Peacock Garden, delivering an unforgettable and authentic taste of Rajputana grandeur.

resorts.name: Savoy - IHCL SeleQtions
resorts.description: Step back in time at this colonial-era heritage property nestled in the Nilgiris. Featuring charming vintage architecture, cozy campfires on chilly evenings, and stunning mountain views, it is the perfect escape for those seeking old-world elegance and tranquility.

resorts.name: The Carlton
resorts.description: A magnificent heritage property offering a perfect blend of colonial charm and natural beauty. Guests can cozy up by the campfire under the starry sky, take in the serene mountain views from their private balconies, and experience the timeless elegance of Kodaikanal.

resorts.name: The Himalayan
resorts.description: Built in the style of a grand Victorian castle, this exquisite resort offers a fairy-tale escape in the Himalayas. With antique furnishings, gorgeous heritage architecture, roaring campfires, and spectacular snow-capped mountain views, it is a warm and opulent sanctuary.

resorts.name: Silent Shores Resort & Spa
resorts.description: A serene lakeside sanctuary located just outside the royal city of Mysore. This expansive resort promises ultimate relaxation with a massive infinity pool, revitalizing spa sessions, and peaceful nature walks through beautifully manicured, lush green landscapes.

resorts.name: Taj Madikeri Resort & Spa
resorts.description: Set amidst a lush rainforest canopy, this luxurious Coorg retreat offers an immersive nature experience. Guests can unwind with rejuvenating spa therapies, take a dip in the infinity pool overlooking the misty hills, and explore the beautiful outdoors on guided nature walks.

resorts.name: Le Pondy
resorts.description: Celebrating the unique cross-cultural history of Pondicherry, this premium resort features exquisite French architecture and exclusive access to a pristine private beach. With expansive outdoor party areas and luxurious sea-facing villas, it is an idyllic coastal getaway.

resorts.name: Vythiri Village Resort
resorts.description: A magnificent eco-friendly getaway hidden within the lush green forests of Wayanad. This resort seamlessly blends luxury with nature, offering a relaxing infinity pool, authentic Ayurvedic spa treatments for mind and body rejuvenation, and refreshing nature walks.

activities.name: Zip Line
activities.description: Zip Line is a popular recreational experience designed for guests seeking fun, adventure, and memorable moments. Professional supervision, safety equipment, and well-maintained facilities ensure an enjoyable experience for visitors of all ages.

eventHalls.name: Ocean Breeze Grand Ballroom
eventHalls.description: A luxurious beachfront ballroom offering direct access to the sandy shores. Features grand crystal chandeliers and floor-to-ceiling windows, ideal for vibrant destination weddings and spectacular gala dinners.

eventHalls.name: Pine Valley Amphitheater & Hall
eventHalls.description: An expansive indoor-outdoor arena surrounded by ancient pine trees. The venue offers versatile seating arrangements and a dramatic, misty backdrop for grand events or massive celebrations.

eventHalls.name: The Royal Orchid Enclave
eventHalls.description: Inspired by the regal palaces of Mysore, this magnificent hall boasts ornate pillars and royal tapestries, providing an opulent atmosphere for grand receptions and extravagant cultural events.

eventHalls.name: The Kodava Heritage Pavilion
eventHalls.description: Nestled in the lush hills of Coorg, this heritage pavilion features traditional architecture and panoramic natural views, making it an intimate and breathtaking setting for boutique weddings and private gatherings.

eventHalls.name: Backwater Serenity Pavilion
eventHalls.description: Overlooking the tranquil Kerala backwaters, this pavilion beautifully blends traditional Kerala design with contemporary luxury, offering a serene and highly picturesque venue for large, unforgettable celebrations.

eventHalls.name: The Arabica Event Lawn & Hall
eventHalls.description: Located within a sprawling coffee estate, this stunning glass-walled hall allows guests to celebrate seamlessly with nature. It strikes the perfect balance of rustic charm and premium modern amenities for conventions.

eventHalls.name: Silver Woods Banquet
eventHalls.description: Surrounded by misty mountains and tropical forests, this exquisite banquet hall offers a magical and secluded backdrop for milestone celebrations, intimate parties, and family get-togethers.

eventHalls.name: L'Aura French Heritage Court
eventHalls.description: Reflecting the elegant colonial architecture of Pondicherry, this massive venue features stunning courtyards and grand arches. It is perfectly suited for massive exhibitions, weddings, and extravagant parties.

eventHalls.name: Nilgiri Crown Convention Center
eventHalls.description: Set amidst the rolling tea gardens of Ooty, this state-of-the-art convention center combines colonial charm with modern acoustics, making it perfect for high-level corporate retreats, seminars, and networking events.

eventHalls.name: Misty Peaks Corporate Forum
eventHalls.description: Perched high in the Munnar hills, this sophisticated venue features climate-controlled interiors and advanced audio-visual technology tailored specifically for large-scale corporate symposiums and global conferences.
